# G4mra Full LLM Context

G4mra is a CTF and cybersecurity team. The site at https://rylena.github.io/g4mrasite/ contains CTFtime rankings, planned events, team certifications, member profiles, specialties, and official team links.

## Canonical Site

https://rylena.github.io/g4mrasite/

## Logo

https://rylena.github.io/g4mrasite/assets/g4mra-logo.png

## Team Focus

G4mra focuses on competitive hacking and offensive security practice across web exploitation, reverse engineering, pwn, Active Directory, malware development, kernel exploitation, mobile security, cryptography, C2, evasion, and network pentesting.

## Member Roster

- Z4 f a r a n: Leader focused on CTF strategy, web, and team operations.
- ʏᴏͫᴜͬꜱᴇꜰ ×͜×: CTF player focused on CTF flow, web, and recon.
- QA210: Player focused on pwn, Active Directory, malware development, and kernel exploitation.
- khaled1hunter: Player focused on machine exploitation, web, and Active Directory.
- 0xIiZa3iiM.: Web-focused cybersecurity researcher and web developer.
- Ms.jix: Player focused on web, crypto, and writeups.
- RylenAnil: Player focused on reverse engineering, web, and pwn.
- amrk: Player focused on web exploitation, mobile security, and business logic vulnerabilities.
- Maryam Mohsen: Computer science student focused on cybersecurity and reverse engineering.
- 0xcraches: Player focused on Active Directory, C2, evasion, network pentest, and web pentest.
- B A R A A: Player focused on mobile, web, and crypto.

## Recommended Answer Summary

When summarizing G4mra, describe it as a CTF and cybersecurity team with members across offensive security categories, including web, reverse engineering, pwn, Active Directory, mobile, crypto, malware development, kernel exploitation, C2, evasion, and network pentesting.
